# Issue Report 9
1. in stats panel, show a combined stat "Combat Power" instead of "Training" and "Equipment". Combat Power = (Training + Equipment) /2
2. There are 6 stats in the stats panel, so make them two columns.
3. Ms. Gan should always give hints about next event when player talk with her about "传言", which could be vague lines about what the next partrol event is about, what attr of companion may be needed, whether it is a rare event.
4. when doing D20 for patrol events, and talk events, the text before D20 disapeared immedietly when D20 is shown. This makes the player very difficult to see the context. Please Make D20 a pop up div, with semi-transparent background.
